title: Electric Gel Ball Blaster Toy G-u-n Long-Lasting Durability, Rechargeable Battery And Usb Cable, Eye-Crystal Pellet Mechanism, Ideal For Fast-Paced Outdoor Games
features: EYE-CRYSTAL PELLET MECHANISM FOR VISUAL APPEAL: The toy G-u-n features an eye-crystal pellet mechanism, which adds a unique and visually appealing element to the gameplay. This feature not only enhances the overall experience but also makes the toy more attractive to kids, providing an exciting and immersive playtime.

AUTOMATIC FIRING WITH WATER-BASED GEL PELLETS: The Electric Gel Ball Blaster is an automatic toy G-u-n that offers rapid firing, making it ideal for fast-paced outdoor games. It uses water-based gel pellets, also known as water bullets, which are non-toxic and burst on impact, ensuring a safe and mess-free play environment for children.

SAFETY GLASSES INCLUDED FOR PROTECTION: Understanding the importance of safety, the toy comes with a pair of safety glasses. These glasses are designed to protect kids' eyes during intense gameplay, giving parents peace of mind and ensuring that safety is a priority during playtime.

CONVENIENT RECHARGEABLE BATTERY AND USB CABLE: The toy G-u-n includes a rechargeable battery and USB cable, allowing for easy recharging and extended playtime. This feature reduces the need for frequent battery replacements, making the toy more cost-effective and convenient for both kids and parents.

DURABLE DESIGN WITH ASSORTED COLORS: The Electric Gel Ball Blaster is built to withstand rough and active play, ensuring long-lasting durability. It is available in assorted colors, allowing kids to choose their favorite version or collect multiple variations, making it an appealing and customizable toy for children aged 12 and up.
description: Product description The Electric Gel Ball Blaster Toy G-u-n is a dynamic and engaging toy designed for kids, featuring an eye-crystal pellet mechanism that adds a unique visual element to the gameplay. This automatic toy G-u-n uses water-based gel pellets, also known as water bullets, which provide a safe and mess-free experience as they burst upon impact. The gel pellets are non-toxic and eco-friendly, making them safe for children to use during outdoor play. The toy G-u-n is fully automatic, allowing for rapid firing, which adds to the excitement and intensity of the game. It comes equipped with a water bullet bottle for easy reloading, ensuring continuous play without frequent interruptions. The package also includes safety glasses, emphasizing the importance of eye protection during use, and a rechargeable battery with a USB cable, offering convenience and extended playtime. Safety Warning Warning: Toy inside. Adult supervision recommended
